title: Gitover Config
description: Application configuration loaded from gitover.config.yaml (CWD-walk or ~/.config/gitover/config.yaml fallback). Missing file is valid — all fields have defaults.

git.description: Path to the git executable. Overrides whatever `git` resolves to on $PATH.

auto_fetch_interval.description: Interval in seconds for automatic background fetch of all repos. Default: 600 (10 minutes). Set to 0 to disable.

debug_log.description: Path to the debug log file. Supports `~` and `${VAR}` expansion. Appended to if the file already exists; created otherwise. Can be overridden by the --debug-log CLI flag. App terminates if any variable cannot be resolved.

case_sensitive_path_sorting.description: When true, paths are sorted case-sensitively across all panes (repositories, status files, history commit files).

repo_commands.description: Custom commands appended to the per-repo action menu below a separator line. Keys 1–9 (then 0) are assigned in declaration order.

name.description: Human-readable label shown in the action menu.

cmd.description: Shell command to execute. Variable substitution is applied in two steps: (1) repo variables ${ROOT} and ${BRANCH}; (2) environment variables. Command is not executed if any variable cannot be resolved.

background.description: When true, the command is spawned without waiting and its output is discarded.
